owner.separation: The system catalog owns stable ecosystem semantics; Bureau, GitHub, CI, runtime, contracts and explicit human decisions remain primary truth sources in their domains.

nodes.label: Alexander
nodes.role: sensemaking, priority, approval, abort authority

nodes.label: Ecosystem Map v0
nodes.role: machine-readable overview graph and rendered orientation map

nodes.label: Cabinet
nodes.role: app-independent system catalog for purpose, truth ownership, stable relations and entrypoints

nodes.label: Bureau
nodes.role: task cadence, delegation, run reporting

nodes.label: Grabowski
nodes.role: operator execution, repo work, review gates

nodes.label: Weltgewebe
nodes.role: product and domain core

nodes.label: Lenskit / RepoBrief implementation
nodes.role: context view and citable repository briefs

nodes.label: RepoBrief
nodes.role: public name for context-view layer

nodes.label: Steuerboard
nodes.role: read-only repo-state signal

nodes.label: Vibe-Lab
nodes.role: method lab and evidence experiments

nodes.label: Chronik
nodes.role: append-only event ledger and historical evidence axis

nodes.label: Schauwerk
nodes.role: visual surface and projection layer

nodes.label: Infra
nodes.role: host, network, cockpit and operational runbooks

nodes.label: Device Graph
nodes.role: infrastructure device graph; adjacent but not ecosystem-governance canon

nodes.label: GitHub
nodes.role: repository, PR, issue and review state

nodes.label: CI / Checks
nodes.role: automated tests, lint, gates and review signals

nodes.label: heim-pc
nodes.role: local worktrees, operator cockpit and execution surface

nodes.label: heimserver
nodes.role: home server runtime surface

nodes.label: Codex
nodes.role: code review, logic bugs, invariant checks

nodes.label: Claude
nodes.role: architecture, large refactors, deep concept review

nodes.label: Jules
nodes.role: small clear patches

nodes.label: Local agents
nodes.role: cheap prechecks and repetitive scans

nodes.label: Gemini
nodes.role: proposal-only review capacity; no recurring Cabinet maintenance schedule

nodes.label: Leitstand
nodes.role: read-only ecosystem observability and status projection

nodes.label: Plexer
nodes.role: bounded event delivery and queueing gateway

nodes.label: heimlern
nodes.role: offline operator-learning and proposal generation
